statement.en: Evaluating the energy and environmental performance of a single-family house using building information modeling and life cycle assessment
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is a thesis under embargo with abstract withheld. The work concerns applied LCA/BIM methodology—empirically testable but not yet publicly validated. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional status pending full publication and peer review.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 建物の一生は、物質の重さと環境コストの重ね合わせである。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 建物という容器のなかで、材料と時間と影響が共鳴する。
